title: EMI Recipe Pin
description: Now you can pin a recipe preview for easier repeated crafting
body:
You can now pin a recipe preview for easier repeated crafting viewing. Useful for crafting outside the GUI. For example, create or bloodmagic. 
Have animations and settings.
Yes, you can include this in modpack.

Demonstration
![Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/842f0b3198ddb95f713fbf7ea331eb1759005ffd_0.webp)
